title: Is it possible to change weekend days on timeline/calendar?
excerpt:

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml:
Our current operating days are Tuesday to Saturday.

When trying to utilise the timeline within Monday, I can disable the weekend days in admin settings. This feature could be fantastic for us, however, it only allows the admin to set the weekend days as either Saturday/Sunday or Friday/Saturday.

Is it at all possible to change these days to allow a customised “weekends” in account settings? I would love a Sunday/Monday weekend if possible!

Cheers

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about editing the work schedule?
